name: hpa_saturation
prompt: Our HPA for the checkout service seems stuck at max replicas. Why isn't it scaling down?

recorded_responses.list_hpas: production/checkout-hpa  Ref=Deployment/checkout  Min=2  Max=10  Current=10  CPU=85%/60%  Memory=72%/80%
recorded_responses.describe_resource: {"kind": "HorizontalPodAutoscaler", "name": "checkout-hpa", "namespace": "production", "spec": {"minReplicas": 2, "maxReplicas": 10, "metrics": [{"type": "Resource", "resource": {"name": "cpu", "target": {"type": "Utilization", "averageUtilization": 60}}}], "behavior": {"scaleDown": {"stabilizationWindowSeconds": 300, "policies": [{"type": "Percent", "value": 10, "periodSeconds": 60}]}}}, "status": {"currentReplicas": 10, "desiredReplicas": 10, "currentMetrics": [{"type": "Resource", "resource": {"name": "cpu", "current": {"averageUtilization": 85}}}], "conditions": [{"type": "ScalingActive", "status": "True"}, {"type": "AbleToScale", "status": "True"}, {"type": "ScalingLimited", "status": "True", "reason": "TooManyReplicas", "message": "the desired replica count is more than the maximum replica count"}]}}
